cityIntro: Pasadena homeowners trust us to protect their homes — from craftsman bungalows in Bungalow Heaven to modern builds in South Lake. We understand the unique roofing needs of Pasadena's historic neighborhoods and deliver quality that lasts.

cityFAQ.question: Do you work on older and historic homes in Pasadena?
cityFAQ.answer: Yes — we specialize in roofing for Pasadena's historic craftsman bungalows, Spanish-style homes, and other older properties. We work with materials that respect your home's character while meeting current California code requirements.
